feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Sun guards his moon
entry.summary:
Author: chibithedragonkitty

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,059Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 118

Summary: A wealthy CEO in Metropolis wants the prince of Gotham, Bruce Wayne as his own. A very obsessive love but more of seeing Bruce as a possession, to be owned. Little does he know that a mild-mannered reporter secretly known as Superman isn't going to let that happen.

entry.title: Eternity
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,478Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 88

Summary: On a cruise ship, Clark Kent's Kryptonian biology recognizes something in Bruce Wayne that even Bruce doesn't see: kor'va—soul recognition. The moment one consciousness knows another will change everything. Three years later, they undergo ra'sh'mora, the ancient Kryptonian bonding ritual. It's not marriage. It's a permanent quantum entanglement of two nervous systems. Clark feels Bruce constantly—his heartbeat, his emotions, his presence. They are never alone again. Then Bruce's heart starts failing.

entry.title: How to Lose Your Virginity (And Accidentally Fall in Love)
entry.summary:
Author: breathbetween

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,643Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 205

Summary: Bruce let out a deep, tired sigh and rubbed at his temple with his glove. “Speak,” he grunted. “You- you mean that-” Clark took a sharp breath, his voice coming out thin, like air slipping from a deflating balloon. “You’re also a virgin?!” Bruce regretted engaging in this conversation instantly. It could have been such a peaceful night.  or whereBatman doesn’t do relationships. Superman is afraid he might hurt someone if he tries. So they come up with a solution. Because what could possibly go wrong with losing your virginity to your best friend? Right?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part One
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 107,031Chapters: 10/14Kudos: 5

Summary: Five months after disappearing, Aven Davis is running out of time—and out of places to hide. A volatile implant is the only thing keeping the queen inside him dormant, sending him straight into Metropolis and unexpectedly back into Clark Kent’s orbit.Meanwhile, Bruce Wayne’s search for Aven takes a devastating turn, revealing betrayals that put every step he’s taken under Weyland-Yutani’s gaze. With the clock ticking and danger closing in, all three men are pulled toward a collision that will decide whether Aven survives long enough to ever come home. (Please Read Ashes In The Dark part one and Two before Reading.)

entry.title: The Ghost King's Family (of Knights)
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,523Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 123

Summary: The GIW had found Danny. His Parents had sacrificed themselves to try to protect not only him but his fraid. However, the GIW were one step ahead of them and had erected a barrier that no ghost or human could pass through. Desperate to not only get his fraid to safety but to stop the GIW from destroying the Infinite Realms and in turn all of the other universes, Danny (with the help of Clockwork) used a portal to get his fraid out of Amity Park for help.

entry.title: Candle Against The Wind
entry.summary:
Author: LoneChestnutTree

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,849Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 33

Summary: 'The flurry of wind does not snuff the flame from the candle, despite. But a stronger wind blows, and it does. The air is full. Something stronger than him and his misery. He does not lift his head. To his right, a figure by the archway.  Suddenly, his kneeling reverence made sense.'Bruce gets injured. Clark visits. Winter arrives. And they are in the middle of it.

entry.title: I'm having your baby, It's none of your business
entry.summary:
Author: Insomniac_Coffeebean

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,298Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 62

Summary: Bruce is pregnant, turns out kryptonians don't need a partner with a womb in order to procreate. Bruce is obviously going to keep the baby, to add to his endless aray of children, but he doesn't want Clark to feel obligated to raise a child with him. Scilla if you see this: (1): no you fucking didn't and (2): I'll fucking kill you.

entry.title: don't make me cry (don't make me say it out loud)
entry.summary:
Author: bluebelled

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,881Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 32

Summary: “Ahh, so this is about expectations?” Clark huffed a small, incredulous laugh. He had started to pace slowly in the space between them, frustration evident in his posture.“I’d expect Brucie Wayne to be upstairs with his date by now, not arguing about ‘mission critical rest’ with me,” Clark took a deep breath. He noticed that Clark did little things like that, taking in air he didn’t need, staying behind to argue with Bruce when anyone else would have left. -------------------- AKA the Clark-jealousy fic where Bruce tries to get over Clark via his doppelganger!

entry.title: raison d'être
entry.summary:
Author: ilovepinkandcoffee

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,142Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 477

Summary: (n.) a reason for existingA year after the Riddler’s attack on Gotham, Batman struggles to repair a city fractured and drowning in crime. But when rumors spread through Gotham’s criminal underworld about an alien hero in Metropolis—an otherworldly figure with god-like powers who’s changing the course of history—Bruce can't help but be skeptical. But his concerns are confirmed when this so-called "Superman," arrives in Gotham one night during his patrol, bringing with him a wave of chaos that threatens to disrupt the fragile balance he has fought so hard to maintain.Clark had heard about Gotham City when he first arrived at Metropolis—a lawless, crime-ridden city plagued with corruption—but he had never felt the need to enter its borders. That is until he learns of a mysterious vigilante known as "The Batman," a figure who, like him, seeks justice for his city and its people, his curiosity gets the better of him. Drawn to the idea of meeting someone with a shared mission, Clark decides to seek out the elusive hero, after all, nothing bad can come out of it can it? But boy was he wrong.

entry.title: Wally for some reason knows Bat Stuff™
entry.summary:
Author: allien013

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,005Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 582

Summary: Wally just wants to cover for his uncle Barry and be The Flash. But no. Ever time he is on Watch Tower Batboys find ways to bothers him. Wally doesn't know who is more irritated by this him or Bruce. As if that wasn't enough, Wally has to hide his secret identity, and if he fails, Batdad (his father-in-law) will kill him (seriously). Wally hasn't even really started, and He already feels like he needs a vacation.

entry.title: Forever and evermore (For Eternity)
entry.summary:
Author: starfishingbythehill

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,147Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 9

Summary: “Come on Clark, it isn’t even that scary!” Clark’s face reminds him of the statue in his mother’s garden, the one over the fountain. The scrunched nose, the distant eyes, the thin lips. Displeasure and acceptance both. He really doesn’t understand what’s wrong. “We climb higher in the barn.” “It isn’t the same thing !” Clark denies. “I can’t do it Bruce, I’m not allowed to. It would make Ma sad.” “You’re such a wuss.” Bruce rolls his eyes and jumps down the tree. Clark pouts, crossing his arms in front of himself. Bruce rolls his eyes harder. Clark never breaks the rules and he never seems happy about it. Anyway, he won’t even stay mad for long, they’re best friends so it’s okay. “Let’s go see the horses. Tommy is teaching me how to ride.” Clark smiles at him then. See? What did he say, it’s okay. They can’t stay mad at each other for long because they can’t stay away from each other for long. They are best friends after all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: 4LiberTEA

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,507Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Forced together for business reasons, Bruce and Clark need to learn how to work together both in and out the suit, all the while dealing with their respective feelings for the other person's secret identity. As they chase love at one end, it comes running from the opposite direction. Will their feelings for one another ever intersect? Or will they keep running in endless squares circles?

entry.title: Being part of the Kent-Wayne family isn’t so bad
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,926Chapters: 6/39Kudos: 85

Summary: It’s been three years since Dick and Kori got married, and many things have changed for the Kent-Wayne family. The family grew larger through more adoptions and also biological ties. New soulmates were discovered, more weddings were held, the Justice League can finally put a name to the man behind the cowl, and Wayne Manor will never look the same again. But the greatest change? Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent are officially engaged. This is the story of how they got there. As for Conner? He couldn’t be doing any better!

entry.title: What Would You Trade the Pain For?
entry.summary:
Author: theFamousLivingDead

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,785Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: D: Got a job for you. On one condition?B: What condition?D: Clark tags along.B: No.D: Bruce. It's the only condition.B: Send Hal. Barry. Anyone else. After a disastrous Justice League mission, Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne are at each other's throats. Literally. They both mean well, but cannot appreciate each other's bothersome influences. When Lex Luthor escapes to a town where the Justice League can't follow, Diana calls upon Bruce to go undercover. But he's not allowed to go on his own. Or.. Bruce and Clark get a chance to mend whatever relationship they have by playing pretend and who knows, they might end up being great actors after all!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: Redhood_fan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,043Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 15
